content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Divisibility Problem". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1328/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. Each test case consists of two space-separated integers n and m.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the minimum number of operations required to make n divisible by m.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Check if n is already divisible by m. If not, find the minimum number of operations required to make n divisible by m.
